properties.valid:
SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE
WHERE customer_id NOT LIKE '%%%%CORRUPTED%%%%'
AND payment_method NOT LIKE '%%%%CORRUPTED%%%%'
AND order_status NOT LIKE '%%%%CORRUPTED%%%%'
properties.corrupted:
SELECT * FROM FLOWFILE
WHERE customer_id LIKE '%%%%CORRUPTED%%%%'
OR payment_method LIKE '%%%%CORRUPTED%%%%'
OR order_status LIKE '%%%%CORRUPTED%%%%'
